message:
✨ Phase 2 accessibility: keyboard navigation for dashboard cards (#1233)

- Add useCardGridNavigation hook for arrow key grid navigation
- Make cards focusable with Tab (tabIndex, focus ring, gridcell role)
- Enter/Space on focused card opens expanded view
- Focus restores to card when expanded modal closes
- Arrow keys navigate cards respecting 12-column grid layout

Closes partially #1151

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
